name: projects/project/locations/location/instances/instance/emailTemplates/3
content:
Subject: [Action Required / Question / Info]: [Brief Summary of the Email's Purpose]

Salutation:
Dear [Name],
(Or use "Hi [Name]," for a slightly less formal tone)

The Opening (The "Why"):
I hope this email finds you well. I am writing to [state the primary purpose of your email in one sentence, e.g., follow up on our meeting / request information about X / introduce you to Y].

The Body (The Details):
Here is a quick overview of what we need to discuss:

Point 1: [Provide the most important detail or context here.]

Point 2: [Keep it concise. If you have data or a file, mention: "I have attached [Document Name] for your reference."]

Point 3: [Add any final relevant detail or deadline.]

The Call to Action (The Next Step):
Could you please [state exactly what you need them to do, e.g., review the attached document / let me know your availability for a quick call next week / reply with your feedback by Friday]?

The Sign-off:
Thank you for your time and assistance. I look forward to hearing from you.

Best regards,

[Your Name]
[Your Title/Role]
[Your Contact Information]
[Link to your LinkedIn or Portfolio - Optional]

name: projects/project/locations/location/instances/instance/emailTemplates/1
author: db394030-8808-4edd-8a5f-1482d7f10581
content:
Subject: [Action Required/Inquiry/Update]: [Brief Topic of the Email]

Dear [Recipient Name],

I hope this email finds you well.

I am writing to you today regarding [state the main purpose of your email clearly and concisely].

[Use this paragraph to provide necessary context or details. Keep it brief and focused on the facts. If you have multiple points, use bullet points for readability:]

[Detail/Point 1]

[Detail/Point 2]

Could you please [state your Call to Action - exactly what you need the recipient to do, e.g., review the attached document, provide an update, schedule a brief call] by [Date/Time]?

I have attached [Name of Attachment] for your reference. Please let me know if you need any additional information from my end.

Thank you for your time and assistance with this matter.

Best regards,

[Your Name]
[Your Title/Position]
[Your Company/Organization]
[Your Contact Information]
